# The Impact of Social Media on Mental Health and Well-being

## Introduction

Social media has become an integral part of modern life, with platforms like Facebook, Instagram, and Twitter connecting billions of people worldwide. While these platforms offer numerous benefits such as communication, information sharing, and community building, they also pose significant challenges to mental health and well-being. This paper explores the multifaceted relationship between social media usage and mental health, examining both positive and negative effects and offering recommendations for healthier social media habits.
